existing_features.title: Remove the image element located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[7]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1] from the BrideGroomEntrySection. This is an img tag inside the third card's inner div — remove the img element entirely.

Remove the fourth card/div element located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[8]/div[1]/div[2]/div[4]/div[1] from section[8] (the section immediately following BrideGroomEntrySection). Delete the entire div[4] entry from the grid/list in that section.

Remove the fifth card/div element located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[8]/div[1]/div[2]/div[5]/div[1] from section[8]. Delete the entire div[5] entry from the grid/list in that section.

projectName: Remove selected image and two card elements from BrideGroomEntrySection and related section
